body.why: The primitives were misplaced twice — wrong layer (inside the routing proxy, creating device->domains->agentic_loop->device) and wrong scope (hung off the domain base, asserting every coding consumer must be driven turn-by-turn, which is false for aider and for CC). Shared by two devices, owned by neither: that is a primitive, and it gets a home.
